body:
### Description

Hello,

I have encountered an issue where the `golangci_lint_ls` config throws an error in the default `before_init` function if `golangci-lint` is not installed. This is because `go version -m $(which golangci-lint) | grep '^\smod'` fails silently, and the function falls back to calling `golangci-lint version` directly.

Minimal reproduction:
```sh
~/.config/nvim-golangci-lint-ls-test % which golangci-lint-langserver
/opt/homebrew/bin/golangci-lint-langserver
~/.config/nvim-golangci-lint-ls-test % which golangci-lint
golangci-lint not found
~/.config/nvim-golangci-lint-ls-test % git clone https://github.com/neovim/nvim-lspconfig ./pack/nvim/start/nvim-lspconfig
Cloning into './pack/nvim/start/nvim-lspconfig'...
remote: Enumerating objects: 23466, done.
remote: Counting objects: 100% (708/708), done.
remote: Compressing objects: 100% (180/180), done.
remote: Total 23466 (delta 609), reused 537 (delta 527), pack-reused 22758 (from 3)
Receiving objects: 100% (23466/23466), 7.42 MiB | 3.11 MiB/s, done.
Resolving deltas: 100% (15787/15787), done.
~/.config/nvim-golangci-lint-ls-test % cat init.lua
vim.cmd.packadd("nvim-lspconfig")
vim.lsp.enable("golangci_lint_ls")
~/.config/nvim-golangci-lint-ls-test % NVIM_APPNAME=nvim-golangci-lint-ls-test nvim main.go
```
Produces the following error:
```
Error in BufNewFile Autocommands for "*":
Lua callback: ...rew/Cellar/neovim/0.12.1/share/nvim/runtime/filetype.lua:28: BufNewFile Autocommands for "*"..FileType Autocommands for "*": Vim(append):LSP[
golangci_lint_ls]: Error BEFORE_INIT_CALLBACK_ERROR: "vim/_core/system.lua:0: ENOENT: no such file or directory (cmd): 'golangci-lint'"
stack traceback:
        [C]: in function '_with'
        ...rew/Cellar/neovim/0.12.1/share/nvim/runtime/filetype.lua:27: in function <...rew/Cellar/neovim/0.12.1/share/nvim/runtime/filetype.lua:10>
```

`before_init` should likely return early if `golangci-lint` is not found. For example, the following change fixes the issue:
```diff
  before_init = function(_, config)
+   -- Abort early if golangci-lint is not installed.
+   if vim.fn.executable("golangci-lint") ~= 1 then
+     return
+   end
+
    -- Add support for golangci-lint V1 (in V2 `--out-format=json` was replaced by
    -- `--output.json.path=stdout`).
    local v1, v2 = false, false
    -- PERF: `golangci-lint version` is very slow (about 0.1 sec) so let's find
    -- version using `go version -m $(which golangci-lint) | grep '^\smod'`.
    if vim.fn.executable 'go' == 1 then
      local exe = vim.fn.exepath 'golangci-lint'
      local version = vim.system({ 'go', 'version', '-m', exe }):wait()
      v1 = string.match(version.stdout, '\tmod\tgithub.com/golangci/golangci%-lint\t')
      v2 = string.match(version.stdout, '\tmod\tgithub.com/golangci/golangci%-lint/v2\t')
    end
    if not v1 and not v2 then
      local version = vim.system({ 'golangci-lint', 'version' }):wait()
      v1 = string.match(version.stdout, 'version v?1%.')
    end
    if v1 then
      config.init_options.command = { 'golangci-lint', 'run', '--out-format', 'json' }
    end
  end,
```

I'm more than happy to open a PR with this change to the default config. Please let me know the best path forward!
title: golangci_lint_ls: `before_init` throws error if `golangci-lint` is not installed
